by.description:
Specify the Mailing List by name or by ID.
IDs are automatically unique, if you use a non-unique name,
it will result in an error.
by.name: by

by.description:
Specify the webhook integration by name or by ID.
IDs are automatically unique, if you use a non-unique name,
it will result in an error.
by.name: by

Specify the webhook integration template reference by name or by ID.
IDs are automatically unique, if you use a non-unique name,
it will result in an error.

IDs are automatically unique, if you use a non-unique name,
it will result in an error.

referenceBodyTemplate.description: Retrieves specific webhook reference body template.
referenceBodyTemplate.name: referenceBodyTemplate

definition.description: Represents a reusable webhook body template for standardizing payload formats.

bodyTemplate.description: JSON body template used as a reference for webhook payloads.
bodyTemplate.name: bodyTemplate

header.description: Optional custom headers sent with the webhook request.
header.name: header

id.description: Unique identifier of the Webhook Reference Body Template.
id.name: id

name.description: Name of the webhook reference body template
name.name: name

requestMethod.description: HTTP method used when sending the webhook request (e.g., POST, PUT).
requestMethod.name: requestMethod

responseMapping.description:
Defines JSON path mappings used to extract values from the webhook response payload.
At present, only a single mapping is supported, with the key "correlationId".
The value must be a valid JSON path pointing to the field in the response payload that represents the correlation identifier (for example, result.sys_id).
responseMapping.name: responseMapping

url.description: Target URL where the webhook sends requests.
url.name: url

webhookRelationType.description: Indicates whether this template is for CREATE operations, UPDATE operations, or NONE (null if not applicable)
webhookRelationType.name: webhookRelationType

definition.name: WebhookReferenceBodyTemplate

referenceBodyTemplateList.description: Retrieves all available webhook reference body templates.

definition.description: Represents the response payload for listing predefined webhook body templates.

items.description: List of predefined webhook reference body templates.

responseMapping.name: responseMapping

url.description: Target URL where the webhook sends requests.

mailingList.description: Retrieves details of a specific Mailing List
mailingList.name: mailingList

definition.description:
Represents a Mailing List entity, including its
unique ID, name, type, associated email addresses, administrators,
and audit metadata.

address.description: List of email addresses included in the Mailing List.
address.name: address

admin.description: List of account administrators assigned to manage the Mailing List.
admin.name: admin

definition.name: AdminRef

audit.description: Audit metadata containing creation and modification details.
audit.name: audit

AdminRef.name: AdminRef

ApiKeyRef.name: ApiKeyRef

id.description: Unique identifier of the Mailing List.
id.name: id

type.description: Specifies how the Mailing List addresses are defined (e.g., all admins, specific_emails, system).
type.name: type

subscriptionGroup.description:
Retrieves details of a specific Subscription Group for the account.
Subscription Groups combine Mailing Lists and integrations
(including webhooks) for sending notifications.
subscriptionGroup.name: subscriptionGroup

definition.description: Represents a Subscription Group that combines Mailing Lists and webhook integrations.
